title: neural-avalanche-utac v0.1.0: UTAC Analysis of Neural Avalanche Criticality
description: neural-avalanche-utac v0.1.0 applies UTAC (Universal Threshold Activation Criticality) to neurophysiological data to detect criticality signatures in neural avalanche cascades. The UTAC-Logistic ODE identifies critical branching ratios and threshold transitions in LFP/spike time series consistent with brain criticality theory. CREP metrics measure coherence and emergent information integration across cortical network states. Bridges neuroscience and the GenesisAeon thermodynamic framework. Dual-licensed: GPLv3-or-later (code) + CC BY 4.0 (documentation).
